command: echo '=== Kill any leftover ===' && killall -9 terminal64.exe 2>/dev/null; wineserver -k 2>/dev/null; sleep 2 && echo '=== Check crontab ===' && crontab -l 2>/dev/null | head -10 && echo '=== Checking interfering services ===' && systemctl list-units --type=service --state=running --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'mt5\|restore\|watchdog\|deploy' && echo '=== Starting MT5 ===' && export DISPLAY=:99 WINEPREFIX=/root/.wine WINEDEBUG=-all STAGING_WRITECOPY=1 && cd '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5' && nohup wine terminal64.exe /portable > /dev/null 2>&1 & sleep 15 && echo '=== MT5 running? ===' && ps aux | grep terminal64 | grep -v grep && echo '=== Terminal log (latest) ===' && TLOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$TLOG" ]; then tail -30 "$TLOG" | tr -d '\0'; fi && echo '=== EA log (today) ===' && cat '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/20260227.log' 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\0' | tail -20 && echo '=== EA log (latest) ===' && EALOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$EALOG" ]; then echo "File: $EALOG"; tail -20 "$EALOG" | tr -d '\0'; fi
